basics.label: Junior Swift Engineer
basics.name: Jordan Vale
basics.summary: Builds Swift features, test fixtures, and small Linux-safe tools while growing into product ownership.

projects.description: Explains how a small Swift package groups appointments by day with deterministic fixtures.
highlights: Shows before-and-after examples for empty and multi-day schedules.
Includes Linux test command output in the write-up.
projects.name: Swift Date Grouping Notes

projects.description: Presented lessons from replacing stringly typed navigation state with enums.
highlights: Covered tradeoffs for small teams maintaining UIKit apps.
projects.name: Campus App Demo Talk

highlights: Added unit tests around date grouping and empty-state rendering.
Documented setup steps for running the package on Linux CI.

highlights: Paired with senior engineers to replace stringly typed view state with enums.
